text: a lot of you guys are asking where to use seedance 2.0, ive shared various ways already but here is a way that is working for sd2 fast 10s vids:this is not the way i use it, i simply just usehttps://jimeng.jianying.com/ai-tool/home/if nothing here works i would highly advise just waiting till it releases, multiple people have told me they have been scammed for fake accounts etc1. Clickhttp://doubao.com/chat/in your browser’s incognito mode2. Add “Video Generation (Seedance 2.0):” before your prompt3. Image reference uploads are also supportedA 10s 720P video consumes 2 video generation credits.There are 10 credits in total, which means you can generate up to 50s of 720P video overall
html:
a lot of you guys are asking where to use seedance 2.0, ive shared various ways already but here is a way that is working for sd2 fast 10s vids:

this is not the way i use it, i simply just use https://jimeng.jianying.com/ai-tool/home/

if nothing here works i would highly advise just waiting till it releases, multiple people have told me they have been scammed for fake accounts etc

1. Click http://doubao.com/chat/ in your browser’s incognito mode

2. Add “Video Generation (Seedance 2.0):” before your prompt

3. Image reference uploads are also supported

A 10s 720P video consumes 2 video generation credits.

There are 10 credits in total, which means you can generate up to 50s of 720P video overall
